case_title: JULIA SHAKOORI VS. AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.,INC A CA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JULIA SHAKOORI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SHABAN SHAKOORI, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO. INC A CA CORPORATION IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY JASON SCHER (SC-109 IS ON FILE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAKOORI, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.,INC A CA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-11-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SETTLEMENT AGRREMENT IS REACHED. COURT ORDERS $500.00 TO PLAINTIFF TO COVER COSTS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT AGREES TO REPAIR PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE BY JULY 11, 2022. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET, AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. AN APPEARANCE WILL BE REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT ARE NOT MET. ZOOM APPEARANCE IS ALLOWED AT THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF JULIA SHAKOORI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC., REPRESENTED BY JASON SCHER, HONDA ASSISTANT ZONE MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. (HEARING SET FOR APRIL 12, 2022 AT 10:00AM)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHAKOORI, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.,INC A CA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (HEARING SET FOR APRIL 12, 2022 AT 10:00AM)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $58.00) SERVED FEB-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.,INC A CA CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JASON SCHER, HONDA ASSISTANT ZONE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.,INC A CA CORPORATION
